news.summary: Today, Landsvirkjun has effectively launched green bonds in the U.S. private placement market, raising a total of USD 150 million. Originally aiming for USD 125 million, the issuance was increased due to high investor demand, resulting in the final closure amount of USD 150 million.
news.headline: Landsvirkjun issues $150M green bonds in U.S. private placement market after strong investor interest, surpassing $125M target.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Scrypted Inc. announced the acquisition of Chibi Clash, a gaming ecosystem known for its popular titles Kingdoms and Survivor. This move will offer Scrypted access to key game engine and web3 technology assets for their Autonomous Virtual Beings (AVB) initiative. The acquisition is aimed at strengthening Scrypted's position in the gaming industry and is indicative of the company's focus on further developing its AVB offerings.
news.headline: Scrypted buys Chibi Clash for AI gaming; gains Kingdoms & Survivor; boosts AVB tech. Washington, May 15, 2025.

news.summary: A ribbon-cutting event will be held by a popular supermarket chain on June 4th in COLTON, Calif. The event marks the celebration of Vallarta Supermarkets, a prominent Latino-owned grocery chain in California, on 40 years of serving the community.
news.headline: Vallarta Supermarkets opens 60th store in Colton, California. Ribbon-cutting on June 4th. Leading Latino-owned grocery chain.

news.summary: A subsidiary of Phillips 66, listed as PSX on NYSE, has finalized a deal to sell 65% of its retail marketing business in Germany and Austria to a consortium owned by subsidiaries of Energy Equation Partners and Stonepeak. The agreement is set at an enterprise value of approximately €2.5 billion, which equals around $2.8 billion. The transaction is based on an Enterprise Value/EBITDA multiple of 9.1x, considering the anticipated 2025 EBITDA. Phillips 66 foresees receiving pre-tax cash proceeds of about €1.5 billion, equivalent to $1.6 billion, after standard purchase price adjustments have been made. Additional insights can be found in the complete article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Phillips 66 sells 65% stake in European retail market for $2.8 billion to consortium, expects $1.6 billion in cash proceeds.
US 30-Year Freddie Mac Fixed Rate Mortgages 15-May Wk: 6.81% (prev 6.76%)

news.summary: In Washington on May 15, 2025, Team Velocity, a prominent marketing technology company catering to the automotive sector, introduced Vehicle Detail Videos (VDVs). This groundbreaking technology utilizes AI to automatically create engaging videos showcasing dealership inventory. The innovation aims to enhance the customer experience and drive sales.
news.headline: Team Velocity introduces VDV, AI-driven vehicle detail videos for dealerships, boosting conversions.

news.summary: In a press release from Palo Alto, California on May 15, 2025, Pangea, a prominent AI security guardrail provider, shared results from their recent study. The study, called the $10,000 Prompt Injection Challenge, took place in March 2025 on a global scale. Over 800 individuals from 85 countries took part in this initiative that spanned one month.
news.headline: Pangea report on GenAI vulnerabilities reveals insights from 300,000+ prompt injection attempts in $10,000 Global Challenge.

news.summary: Sony Electronics Inc. unveiled their latest wireless noise-canceling headphones, the WH-1000XM6, on May 15, 2025. These headphones were developed in collaboration with top mastering audio engineers, ensuring studio-quality precision sound. Boasting Sony's most advanced noise-canceling technology to date, the WH-1000XM6 offers unparalleled audio experience.
news.headline: Sony announces WH-1000XM6 headphones with advanced noise cancellation co-created by audio engineers.

news.summary: In a recent report by VerdictSearch and Law.com, it was announced that Midwest Energy Emissions Corp, represented by Caldwell Cassady & Curry from Dallas, secured a significant victory in a patent infringement case in 2024. The multimillion-dollar verdict stands out as one of the Top 100 Verdicts of the year. This achievement highlights the prowess of the legal team and underscores the importance of protecting intellectual property rights in the industry.
news.headline: Midwest Energy Emissions wins multimillion-dollar patent infringement case, ranked in top 100 verdicts of 2024.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, the AI Acceleration Cloud company Together AI revealed the acquisition of Refuel.ai, a company known for converting unstructured data into organized datasets for AI purposes. This acquisition bolsters Together AI's position in the market and enhances its capabilities in handling high-quality datasets for AI applications.
news.headline: Together AI acquires Refuel.ai to speed up AI app development. Acquisition strengthens Together AI's capabilities in transforming unstructured data.

news.summary: In Monterey, California, on May 15, 2025, the popular vintage fashion brand Retro Stage is marking its 8th year since establishment. Renowned for its commitment to merging nostalgic trends with contemporary tastes using impeccable artisanal techniques, Retro Stage is commemorating this milestone by...
news.headline: Vintage fashion brand Retro Stage celebrates 8th anniversary, known for blending nostalgic styles from 1920s to 1980s.

news.summary: Taking place on May 15, 2025, in Los Angeles, the 4th Annual California Turkish Festival organized by ATASC will be held on Sunday, June 1st. The festival is free for everyone to attend and will offer a variety of Turkish cuisine and beverages. There will be live entertainment throughout the day, as well as numerous activities designed for children. This event promises a day filled with delicious food, cultural experiences, and fun for attendees of all ages.
news.headline: 4th Annual California Turkish Festival on June 1st at Shoreline Aquatic Park in Long Beach. Free event with Turkish cuisine, live entertainment, and activities. LOS ANGELES, May 15, 2025 /PRNewswire.

news.summary: In Fremont, California on May 15, 2025, THINK Surgical, Inc. revealed that their TMINI® Miniature Robotic System had reached a milestone of being employed in 1,000 total knee (TKA) procedures. The significant 1,000th case was successfully conducted by Dr. [...] as part of the company's endeavors in orthopedic surgical robots.
news.headline: THINK Surgical's TMINI® Miniature Robotic System hits 1,000th total knee procedure milestone. #surgicalrobots #innovation

news.summary: Today, a prominent organization is launching a global campaign in New York to educate social-media users on spotting fake imagery. Columbia Journalism Review, a leading voice on press criticism and the future of news, is utilizing viral AI images to teach Americans the necessary skills. The campaign aims to reach a wide audience and improve awareness about the prevalence of fake imagery online.
news.headline: Columbia Journalism Review uses AI images to educate users on spotting fake imagery, launching global campaign.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, in Los Angeles, a leading vacation lifestyle brand Cupshe has announced a new collaboration with renowned fashion influencer and winner of The Bachelor Season 28, Kelsey Anderson. Anderson will be the brand's fresh ambassador, working on the exclusive Cupshe x Kelsey Anderson collection. This partnership showcases Cupshe's commitment to engaging with influencers, as they tap Anderson's following of over a million to expand their reach in the fashion market.
news.headline: Cupshe partners with The Bachelor winner Kelsey Anderson for a new swim and apparel collection.

news.summary: In recent times, the cost of car insurance is increasing, alongside other expenses. Drivers are eager to reduce their auto insurance premiums. Factors such as driving history, age, and vehicle type significantly impact insurance rates. Consumers are seeking strategies to mitigate these escalating costs.
news.headline: Mercury Insurance highlights key factors impacting car insurance rates: Driving record, age, vehicle type.

news.summary: Bubble has announced the launch of its inaugural campus scholarship program, granting over 20 scholarships to brand and college ambassadors. Participants have the opportunity to earn up to $10,000 through this initiative. Bubble is a community-driven brand focused on providing premium quality and effective skincare products. The program aims to support ambassadors and students who are passionate about skincare and beauty. The scholarships offer financial assistance and recognition for their dedication to the brand.
news.headline: Bubble launches first-ever campus scholarship program; offering 20+ scholarships; ambassadors can earn up to $10,000.

news.summary: Prepare for an out-of-this-world experience with Planet Party Time! Recently launched by NetEase Games in Hangzhou, China on May 15, 2025, this innovative social simulation and party game invites players to mingle with friends and create their very own planets. The game offers a unique opportunity for players to gather and enjoy shared experiences within a virtual galaxy. Don't miss out on this exciting adventure now available to play worldwide.
news.headline: NetEase Games launches new social simulation and party game, Planet Party Time, offering players a chance to build planets and party with friends.

news.summary: A recent partnership between Shaw-Ross International Importers and Smoke Wagon Bourbon aims to strengthen Shaw-Ross's position in the American whiskey market. The collaboration, announced on May 15, 2025, marks a significant move for Shaw-Ross as Smoke Wagon Bourbon is recognized as one of the fastest-growing brands in the category. This strategic alliance will allow Shaw-Ross to tap into the success of Smoke Wagon Bourbon and expand its reach in the market. The partnership signals a promising growth opportunity for both companies as they work together to capitalize on the increasing demand for premium American whiskey.
news.headline: Shaw-Ross International Importers partner with Smoke Wagon Bourbon to expand presence in American whiskey market.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Brunel International N.V. (BRNL) disclosed the outcomes of the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders (AGM), where crucial decisions were made for the company's future. Brunel is a leading global provider of tailored project and workforce services aimed at fostering sustainable industry growth by leveraging technology and expertise.
news.headline: Brunel's AGM finalized with approval of all voting items in Amsterdam, BRNL; company specializes in project and workforce solutions.

news.summary: Solutions30, the leading provider of multi-technical services in Europe for telecommunications, energy, and IT industries, has appointed Antoine Mirabel as the new CEO of their operations in France. Mirabel takes over from Amaury Boilot, who held the position temporarily since June 2023 while also managing group-level duties. Additionally, Oliver Fidorra has been named Co-CEO of the company's operations in Germany, sharing the role with Luc Brusselaers, who holds the title of Chief Revenue Officer for the organization. Moreover, in Belgium, Axel Vandevenne has been appointed as Co-CEO to oversee and enhance local operations in collaboration with Raf Winnelinckx.
news.headline: Solutions30 appoints 3 new CEOs: Antoine Mirabel in France, Oliver Fidorra in Germany, and Axel Vandevenne in Belgium, assisting local operations.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Freddie Mac unveiled the findings of its latest Primary Mortgage Market Survey ® (PMMS ® ). The report indicated that the average rate for a 30-year fixed-rate mortgage (FRM) stood at 6.81%.
news.headline: 30-year fixed-rate mortgage averages 6.81%, lower than 7%, per Freddie Mac survey on May 15, 2025.

news.summary: VALLOUREC, a French corporation, operates as a limited liability company (société anonyme) with a Board of Directors and a share capital of €4,767,162.72. The company is headquartered at 12 rue de la Verrerie, 92190 Meudon, France, and is registered on the Nanterre Trade and Companies Register under number 552 142 200.
news.headline: Vallourec is a French company with a share capital of €4,767,162.72. Registered office in Meudon, France.

news.summary: Praxis Solutions, based in Newport Beach, California, made an announcement on May 15, 2025, revealing that Patrick Miller has become a member of its Advisory Council. Miller, a seasoned executive boasting over 20 years of expertise in alternative industries, will now be contributing his knowledge and skills to the AI consulting firm. This move underscores Praxis Solutions' commitment to revolutionizing the wealth and asset management sectors.
news.headline: Industry leader Pat Miller joins Praxis Solutions Advisory Council in Newport Beach, CA, bringing over 20 years of alternative industry experience.

news.summary: The reduction in President Trump's tariffs on Chinese goods provided relief for businesses, allowing for some flexibility. However, the uncertainty surrounding long-term planning remains, with many companies still hesitant to make significant strategic decisions.
news.headline: Small business owners adapt to reduced tariffs on Chinese goods by President Trump. Long-term planning remains uncertain.

news.summary: In the town of Mt. Hope, Ohio, on May 15, 2025, Genie®, a renowned pioneer in garage door openers and home security solutions, unveiled its latest cutting-edge development: a residential linear actuator gate. Designed to be smart, long-lasting, and optimized for real-world functionality, this innovation is set to transform the market. Stay tuned for more exciting surprises from Genie® in the near future.
news.headline: Genie® unveils new linear actuator gate operator for residential use, promising smart and durable performance.

news.summary: In New York on May 15, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, a legal firm focusing on investor rights, has initiated investigations into various companies for potential breaches of federal securities laws and/or fiduciary duties to shareholders. The investigation includes LENSAR, Inc. (NASDAQ: LNSR), examining its sale transaction.
news.headline: Investigator Halper Sadeh LLC probes LNSR, DNB, and BRDG for shareholder concerns on alleged violations.

news.summary: San Francisco, May 15, 2025 - Planful Inc., a leading provider of financial performance management cloud software, unveiled a range of innovations aimed at enhancing efficiency for teams. This includes the introduction of persona-based AI assistants, along with improvements in consolidations, workforce planning, and integrations. These new capabilities are designed to assist teams in automating routine tasks and optimizing their financial processes.
news.headline: Planful unveils AI innovations aiming to aid CFOs with talent shortages: Persona-Based AI Assistants, Consolidations, Workforce Planning.

news.summary: In the latest updates, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has significantly increased to 7.9%, with a total of 12.6 million people currently out of work. Additionally, the GDP has dropped by 4.3% in the last quarter, marking a substantial decrease in economic growth. The stock market has also experienced a decline of 600 points, causing concerns among investors. It is evident that the economy is facing challenges due to the ongoing pandemic, leading to financial instability for many individuals and businesses.Experts are closely monitoring the situation, while government officials are working on implementing strategies to address these issues and revive the economy. With the future uncertain, it is crucial for stakeholders to collaborate and take necessary steps to mitigate the damaging impacts of the crisis.
news.headline: JPMorgan CEO Dimon shows emotions on work-from-home comments.

$META: USERS CAN NOW CUSTOMIZE META AI TO PROVIDE DETAILED RESPONSES ON RAY-BAN META GLASSES  META: CALL A VOLUNTEER FEATURE WILL LAUNCH IN ALL 18 COUNTRIES WHERE META AI IS SUPPORTED LATER THIS MONTH

news.summary: Amidst tariff volatility in traditional markets, executives like Ridhima Kahn of Dapper Labs are leveraging blockchain to explore digital markets. Brands are turning to digital collectibles with NFT sales seeing a 7% increase quarter-over-quarter, reaching $2.5 million for NFL All Day and $5.6 million for NBA Top Shot. The total value locked on Flow is at an all-time high of $44.4 million, indicating a broader blockchain application. Enhanced onramping technology has facilitated user experiences, aiding blockchain adoption. With clearer regulation, blockchain is gaining trust, especially among well-known brands. Companies are excelling in fan engagement through IP-backed digital collections. The rise of digital goods offers a globalized, personalized, and valuable user experience, distinct from physical goods. The shift towards digital engagement is predicted to continue as consumers seek utility and unique experiences in the digital space.
news.headline: Tariff upheaval prompts NFL, NBA to boost digital merch. NBA Top Shot at $5.6M, NFL All Day at $2.5M. Total value locked at $44.4M on Flow.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global population has surpassed 7.8 billion people. The COVID-19 pandemic has caused over 200 million cases and 4.5 million deaths worldwide. In economic news, the stock market saw a 2% increase, reaching a record high of 35,000 points. Additionally, the unemployment rate has fallen to 5%, with 10 million jobs added in the last quarter. Finally, the average price of gasoline has risen to $3.00 per gallon, leading to concerns about inflation.
news.headline: JPMorgan CEO expresses frustration about remote work in a statement, acknowledging emotional response.

news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of May 15, 2025, the Battery Disconnect Unit (BDU) Market is categorized by type into Distributed BDU and Centralized BDU, with applications in BEV and PHEV. The market value of the Battery Disconnect Unit (BDU) was recorded at USD 3657 million in 2024, and it is estimated to achieve a significant increase, reaching a projected...
news.headline: Battery Disconnect Unit (BDU) Market is projected to reach $12.56 billion by 2031, increasing from $3.657 billion in 2024. driven by EV growth.

news.summary: Latest addition to Midland's premium external speaker line, the SPKMINI, has been introduced to complement the existing SPK100 and SPK200 models. Promising exceptional audio performance and clear sound quality even in noisy settings, the SPKMINI is set to elevate user experience. This update was unveiled by Midland in KANSAS CITY, Mo. on May 15, 2025. As a notable player in two-way radio communication tech, Midland continues to enhance its product range, catering to the growing demand for reliable and high-quality audio accessories.
news.headline: Midland launches compact mini speaker SPKMINI for clear communication in loud environments, joining SPK100 and SPK200.

news.summary: In Roswell, Georgia on May 15, 2025, BUDS Technology Inc., a prominent company specializing in AI-driven healthcare products, has unveiled the rebranding of its primary virtual medical assistant app. The application previously identified as Nurse Daisy, will now be recognized by a new name. This change comes into effect immediately, marking a significant transformation for the well-known product.
news.headline: BUDS Technology Inc. changes name of virtual medical assistant from "Nurse Daisy" to "AKSSI," expands into senior living market.
LACROIX plans to exit North America by 2025, focusing on key activities. Q1 2025 revenue down by 10.4%.

news.summary: Today in Strasbourg, France, the shareholders of Transgene gathered for the Combined Ordinary and Extraordinary General Meeting. The meeting took place at the company's headquarters located at 400 boulevard Gonthier d’Andernach in Illkirch-Graffenstaden, France. The meeting started at 10:00 a.m. on May 15, 2025, and key decisions were made during the gathering.
news.headline: Transgene held its Combined General Meeting on May 15, 2025 in France.
ARGAN completed refurbishing and expanding a GEODIS fulfilment center in Toulouse, enhancing its capacity by 50%.

news.summary: The stock of Intuitive Surgical experienced a drop on Thursday following the announcement that CEO Gary Guthart will be resigning on July 1. This unexpected news saw the robotic surgery company's shares decline. The departure of Guthart came as a surprise, prompting a negative reaction in the market. The specific percentage drop in stock value was not provided, but it was significant enough to make headlines in Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Intuitive Surgical's stock falls as CEO Guthart steps down, effective July 1.

news.summary: President Donald Trump expressed his dissatisfaction to Apple CEO Tim Cook regarding the company's choice to increase iPhone production in India. Trump voiced his concerns to Cook, indicating that he is displeased with the decision. The move to shift more of the iPhone production to India has apparently raised objections from the president.
news.headline: Trump unhappy with Apple moving more iPhone production to India. Post by Investor's Business Daily.

news.summary: Workhorse Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: WKHS) saw a decline in shares as they reported first-quarter results. The company posted a quarterly loss of $4.68 per share, falling short of the expected $3.44 per share loss. Sales for the quarter came in at $640,920, missing the anticipated $2.35 million. This decrease from $1.34 million was primarily attributed to the Aero divestiture and decreased sales of W4 CC and W56 trucks. During the three months ending on March 31, an institutional investor converted $5.9 million of principal into common stock. Additionally, the company recorded a $3.3 million fair...
news.headline: Workhorse's stock falls after Q1 miss, plans to cut workforce to reduce cash burn. Quarterly sales drop to $640,920 from $1.34 million.
